<table border="1" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="400">
<tr>
<td>
<table border="0" cellpadding="2" cellspacing="0" width="100%">
<tr>
<th align="center" colspan="2" style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="25">  Notice
</th></tr>
<tr>
<td style="background:#EFAAAA;" width="20">
</td><td align="center"> This article is about a clan that has been tagged dead. Any info is to be considered purely of historical value. Feel free to correct any inaccuracies.
</td></tr></table>
</td></tr></table>

Evolution ([e3])

== History ==
A clan formed by [[RuNyoufool]], Fierce and [[User AnubisBlessing|AnubisBlessing]] in late March 2006. The clan got it's initial members from merging parts of three clans; waA , [[New Generation|nG]] and [[We are Noobs|WaN]].
The clan died around summer 2007. Most of their members joined [[Rot In Pieces|RIP]]

[[Category:Clans]]
[[Category:Retired clans]]

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20110721135356/http://www.openlierox.net/wiki/index.php/Evolution -->
